_meta.purpose: Venue library for Bolo Boys event management. Claude checks this before creating new event entries and updates it when new venues are added.

venues.name: Side Saddle
venues.notes: Regular gig. Monthly showcase. Patio available. Often co-billed with Dirty Shame & Acoustic Station.

venues.name: Cultivation Brewing
venues.notes: Multiple bookings. Annual showcase with Dirty Shame.

venues.name: Echo Art Gallery
venues.notes: Address/maps link needed — verify before next show listing. Show: 10/18/2025.

venues.name: B Complex
venues.notes: Hosted Community Christmas Market. Address/maps link needed.

venues.notes: Played 12/13/2025 Christmas show (9 AM–12 PM). Santa in attendance.

venues.name: Wild Heaven Brewing
venues.notes: Ongoing concert series. Typical slots: Fri eve 6:30 PM / Sat afternoon.

venues.name: Wild Heaven Brewing
venues.address: 2935B N Druid Hills Rd NE, Atlanta, GA 30329
venues.notes: Ongoing concert series. Typical slot: Sun afternoon 3–6 PM.

venues.name: Gateway Park at Grant Park
venues.notes: Outdoor park. Booked via Grant Park Conservancy. Typical slot: Sun morning 11 AM.

venues.name: Grant Central Pizza East
venues.notes: Pizza restaurant in East Atlanta Village. First show 5/25/2026.

venues.name: Ideal Sports Bar
venues.notes: New venue as of 2026-05. First booking: June 26 + July 11, 2026. Official brand is 'Ideal Sportsbar' (one word); we normalize to 'Ideal Sports Bar' across the site.
venues.summary: A Lakewood Heights neighborhood bar with dive-bar bones and a family-friendly room — two pool tables inside, a rustic beer garden out back, and bartenders who actually know who's at the bar.
venues.live_music_context: Live bands sit in the regular rotation alongside bingo, karaoke, and holiday nights.
venues.crowd_notes: Multigenerational regulars. The kind of room where the bartender's part of the conversation, not just the order.
venues.practical_notes: Two pool tables inside, beer garden in back. Everyday food and drink prices run comfortable. Family-friendly.
